title: Peppery Dutch Lentils Hash
description: A crispy, plant-based-friendly hash made with brown lentils and a double-fried effect. Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Vegan Double-Fry Seasoning
ingredients.notes: available at most health food stores

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the caraway seeds, black pepper, and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the lentils and leeks to the pan, and stir to combine.
Using a spatula, press down on the mixture to create a crispy bottom, about 10 minutes.
Increase the heat to medium-high and add the vegan double-fry seasoning.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently, until crispy and golden brown.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve warm.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
